---
name: CI Build with tests

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - master
      - jdbi4-dev
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - master
      - jdbi4-dev

concurrency:
  group: ${{ github.workflow_ref }}-${{ github.event.pull_request.number || github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: true

jobs:
  ci:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    strategy:
      matrix:
        distribution: [ temurin ]
        java-version: [ 17, 21, 25 ]
        include:
          - distribution: semeru
            java-version: 25

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-tags: true
          fetch-depth: 0

      - uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        name: setup build jdk
        id: build_jdk
        with:
          java-version: 25
          distribution: temurin
          cache: maven

      - name: build code
        id: install_fast
        env:
          MAVEN_ARGS: "-B -ff"
        run: |
          ./mvnw --version
          make install-fast

      - uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        name: setup test jdk
        id: test_jdk
        with:
          java-version: ${{ matrix.java-version }}
          distribution: ${{ matrix.distribution }}

      - name: run tests
        id: run_tests
        env:
          MAVEN_ARGS: "-B -ff"
        run: |
          ./mvnw --version
          make run-tests

      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        name: upload build logs
        id: upload_build_logs
        continue-on-error: true
        if: ${{ always() }}
        with:
          name: build logs (${{ github.job }}, ${{ matrix.java-version }}, ${{ matrix.distribution }})
          retention-days: 90
          path: |
            **/target
            !**/target/**/*.jar
            !**/target/**/*.class

      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        name: upload build artifacts
        id: upload_build_artifacts
        continue-on-error: true
        with:
          name: build artifacts (${{ github.job }}, ${{ matrix.java-version }}, ${{ matrix.distribution }})
          retention-days: 1
          path: |
            **/target/**/*.jar

  ci-locale:
    name: run_tests with different timezone and locale
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-tags: true
          fetch-depth: 0

      - uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        name: setup build jdk
        id: build_jdk
        with:
          java-version: 25
          distribution: temurin
          cache: maven

      - name: build code
        id: install_fast
        env:
          MAVEN_ARGS: "-B -ff"
        run: |
          ./mvnw --version
          make install-fast

      - name: run tests
        id: run_tests
        env:
          MAVEN_ARGS: "-B -ff -Djdbi.test.timezone=Asia/Colombo -Djdbi.test.language=tr -Djdbi.test.region=TR"
        run: |
          ./mvnw --version
          make run-tests

      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        name: upload build logs
        id: upload_build_logs
        continue-on-error: true
        if: ${{ always() }}
        with:
          name: build logs (${{ github.job }})
          retention-days: 90
          path: |
            **/target
            !**/target/**/*.jar
            !**/target/**/*.class

      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        name: upload build artifacts
        id: upload_build_artifacts
        continue-on-error: true
        with:
          name: build artifacts (${{ github.job }})
          retention-days: 1
          path: |
            **/target/**/*.jar

FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install system dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    curl \
    ca-certificates \
    git \
    make \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Java 25 (temurin)
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    wget \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Download and install temurin JDK 25
RUN mkdir -p /opt/java && \
    curl -fsSL https://github.com/adoptium/temurin25-binaries/releases/download/jdk-25+29/OpenJDK25U-jdk_x64_linux_hotspot_25_29.tar.gz \
    -o /tmp/jdk25.tar.gz && \
    tar -xzf /tmp/jdk25.tar.gz -C /opt/java && \
    rm /tmp/jdk25.tar.gz && \
    ln -s /opt/java/jdk-25+29 /opt/java/jdk

ENV JAVA_HOME=/opt/java/jdk
ENV PATH=$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATH

WORKDIR /app

# Copy the repository
COPY repo/ /app/

# Set Maven arguments
ENV MAVEN_ARGS="-B -ff"

# Copy run script
COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]

FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install system dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    curl \
    ca-certificates \
    git \
    make \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Java 25 (temurin)
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    wget \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Download and install temurin JDK 25
RUN mkdir -p /opt/java && \
    curl -fsSL https://github.com/adoptium/temurin25-binaries/releases/download/jdk-25+29/OpenJDK25U-jdk_x64_linux_hotspot_25_29.tar.gz \
    -o /tmp/jdk25.tar.gz && \
    tar -xzf /tmp/jdk25.tar.gz -C /opt/java && \
    rm /tmp/jdk25.tar.gz && \
    ln -s /opt/java/jdk-25+29 /opt/java/jdk

ENV JAVA_HOME=/opt/java/jdk
ENV PATH=$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATH

WORKDIR /app

# Copy the repository
COPY repo/ /app/

# Set Maven arguments
ENV MAVEN_ARGS="-B -ff"

# Copy run script
COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]

tool_use_result.originalFile:
FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install system dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    curl \
    ca-certificates \
    git \
    make \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Eclipse Temurin JDK 25 from repository
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    gpg-agent \
    wget \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN mkdir -p /etc/apt/keyrings && \
    wget -O /etc/apt/keyrings/adoptium.asc https://packages.adoptium.net/artifactory/api/gpg/key/public && \
    echo "deb [signed-by=/etc/apt/keyrings/adoptium.asc] https://packages.adoptium.net/artifactory/deb $(lsb_release -cs) main" | tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/adoptium.list && \
    apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    temurin-25-jdk \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

ENV JAVA_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/temurin-25-jdk-amd64
ENV PATH=$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATH

WORKDIR /app

# Copy the repository
COPY repo/ /app/

# Set Maven arguments
ENV MAVEN_ARGS="-B -ff"

# Copy run script
COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]

FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install system dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    curl \
    ca-certificates \
    git \
    make \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Eclipse Temurin JDK 25 from repository
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    gpg-agent \
    wget \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN mkdir -p /etc/apt/keyrings && \
    wget -O /etc/apt/keyrings/adoptium.asc https://packages.adoptium.net/artifactory/api/gpg/key/public && \
    echo "deb [signed-by=/etc/apt/keyrings/adoptium.asc] https://packages.adoptium.net/artifactory/deb jammy main" | tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/adoptium.list && \
    apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    temurin-25-jdk \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

ENV JAVA_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/temurin-25-jdk-amd64
ENV PATH=$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATH

WORKDIR /app

# Copy the repository
COPY repo/ /app/

# Set Maven arguments
ENV MAVEN_ARGS="-B -ff"

# Copy run script
COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]
